act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: Online performance of functions, filing of return and payment of tax,
content:
128. Online performance of functions, filing of return and payment of tax,
etc.—Any function under this Act may, subject to the provisions of The Information and
Communications Technology Act, 2006 ( Act No. 39 of 2006), be performed online or
through an electronic means within such time, on such terms and in such manner as may
be prescribed.
